- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	User requested a stock control web app for a hamburger shop using HTML/CSS/JavaScript, a separate backend, REST API, JSON, and a remote database.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Created the project structure manually because automatic setup information was not available for this stack.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Implemented frontend, backend, Firestore integration, optional basic authentication, and documentation.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions needed.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Installed dependencies, checked diagnostics, and verified local responses from backend and frontend.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Created a VS Code task to start backend and frontend together with npm run dev.

- [x] Launch the Project
	Validated the local startup flow by running the task and checking the backend health endpoint plus the frontend URL.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README and copilot-instructions.md were updated with the current architecture, setup, execution, and deployment notes.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
